tool.name: wordcount
tool.summary: Count overlapping normalized sequence words with stable per-record and aggregate reporting

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `wordcount` counts overlapping normalized sequence words across one or more input records. The EMBOSS-RS v1 surface deliberately keeps the model exact and deterministic: words are raw normalized substrings of a fixed width, windows overlap, and counts are reported both per record and in one aggregate summary.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current interface accepts one local sequence input path plus a required word size. Inputs are loaded through the shared EMBOSS-RS readers for FASTA, FASTQ, EMBL, and GenBank and may contain nucleotide, protein, or mixed record sets.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The tool emits a stable table report with columns `scope`, `record`, `molecule`, `word_size`, `word`, `count`, `frequency`, and `skipped_gap_windows`. `scope` is either `record` or `aggregate`. Aggregate rows use `record=ALL` and `molecule=mixed`.

sections.title: Counting Model
sections.content: Words are counted from overlapping windows of length `word_size` in the normalized residue string. Windows containing `-` are skipped and tracked through `skipped_gap_windows`. All other symbols, including ambiguity codes or stop symbols, are treated literally. Frequencies are computed over counted windows after gap-window exclusion.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs wordcount`. Validation currently covers overlapping word counts, aggregate counting across multiple records, skipped gap-window handling, and stable service-level table emission.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The first release does not implement richer residue-class or mismatch-aware word models. It also does not emit a separate extracted-word sequence set; it reports counts only.

artifacts.label: Three-record FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed multi-record FASTA fixture used to validate deterministic overlapping word counts.

examples.title: Count overlapping sequence words
examples.description: Counts overlapping size-2 words across a committed three-record FASTA fixture and emits per-record plus aggregate rows.

expected_outputs.label: Sequence word-count table
expected_outputs.description: A stable tabular report with overlapping word counts and frequencies after gap-window exclusion.
